headline: Baird Upgrades Citizens Financial Group to Outperform, Maintains Price Target to $65
summary: Baird  analyst David George   upgrades Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) from Neutral to Outperform and maintains the price target from $65 to $65.
